chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 786 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 27.01.2026 Mr. Aqeel Ahmed Khan, advocate for the applicant Mr. Khalid Mehmood Rajpar, advocate for respondent Pursuant to order dated 19.11.2025, it is jointly stated that it may be in the interest of justice and revenue that the impugned judgment be set aside and the matter be remanded back to the learned Tribunal for adjudication afresh in accordance with law. Order accordingly. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Amjad
